questionHtml: Explain the reason for linked genes not following the pattern of inheritance discovered by Mendel.
markschemeHtml:
a. «linked genes are» on the same chromosome

b. Mendel's genes were on different chromosomes

c. linked genes are inherited together

    OR

    no independent assortment

d. «linked genes» only separated by crossing over

    OR

    fewer recombinants than with unlinked genes

Reject sex-linkage

meta.title: Explain the reason for linked genes not following the pattern of inheritance discovered by Mendel.
